title: Dashboard UX Audit
summary: description: Audit the coachctl dashboard as a senior endurance coach and UX designer. Load when asked to review, critique, or improve the dashboard UI. Produces structured findings with severity, rationale, and a proposed fix per issue.

claims.text: description: Audit the coachctl dashboard as a senior endurance coach and UX designer.
Load when asked to review, critique, or improve the dashboard UI.
Produces structured findings with severity, rationale, and a proposed fix per issue.
Does not implement changes — findings only.
